arrow_left.title: Navigate left
arrow_left.description: Request one logical leftward navigation step in the currently focused interface.

arrow_right.title: Navigate right
arrow_right.description: Request one logical rightward navigation step in the currently focused interface.

brightness_level.title: Brightness level
brightness_level.description: Report a requested display brightness level as an integer percentage from 0 to 100.

mute_toggle.title: Toggle mute
mute_toggle.description: Request inversion of the current audio mute state; this event never means mute-on or mute-off specifically.

next_track.title: Next track
next_track.description: Request the next playable media item in the active playback context.

play_pause.title: Play or pause
play_pause.description: Request toggling the active playback context between playing and paused states.

previous_track.title: Previous track
previous_track.description: Request the previous playable media item in the active playback context.

stop_playback.title: Stop playback
stop_playback.description: Request stopping playback in the active playback context.

vehicle_present:off.title: Vehicle no longer present
vehicle_present:off.description: Report the transition from vehicle-present to vehicle-absent after the profile presence timeout expires.

vehicle_present:on.title: Vehicle present
vehicle_present:on.description: Report the transition from vehicle-absent to vehicle-present after the configured presence frame is observed.

volume_down.title: Volume down
volume_down.description: Request one relative decrease in audio volume; the binding defines the size of the step.

volume_up.title: Volume up
volume_up.description: Request one relative increase in audio volume; the binding defines the size of the step.
